title: Exact Finite Covariance Matrix Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite covariance bad entry QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact finite-sample replay computes the off-diagonal covariance entry as 4/9 while a malformed row claims 1/2, isolating a compact equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional covariance or Gram rows only when they add distinct finite-sample, positive-semidefinite, PCA, or random-matrix solver pressure; keep inference, asymptotics, estimator consistency, and floating-point covariance algorithms in theorem or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed rational sample table, mean vector, centered rows, centered Gram matrix, covariance matrix, and leading principal minors as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route the false covariance-entry row through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the conflicting entry.
Expose the pack through the probability/statistics and matrix computation learner and consumer query surfaces.
Keep statistical inference, estimator consistency, PCA theorem claims, random-matrix asymptotics, and floating-point covariance algorithms marked Lean or numerical-honesty horizon.
